title: File a Lawsuit
steps: Go to the Civil Registry office on Floor 1, Room 102.
Fill in the lawsuit form (Form C-01). Staff can assist you.
Attach all required documents (see list below).
Pay the filing fee at the Finance desk, Floor 1, Room 105.
Receive your case number and first hearing date.
documents: Evidence supporting your claim (contracts, receipts, photos)
Power of attorney (if filing through a lawyer)

title: Divorce
steps: Visit the Family Affairs office on Floor 2, Room 201.
Request and complete the Divorce Application form (Form F-03).
Submit required documents at the reception desk.
A hearing date will be scheduled — you will receive an SMS confirmation.
Attend the hearing with your lawyer or representative.
documents: National ID or passport (both spouses, original + copy)
Proof of address (utility bill or rental contract)
Power of attorney (if represented by a lawyer)

location.notes: Take elevator to Floor 2, first door on the right

title: Complaint
steps: Go to the Complaints & Petitions desk, Floor 1, Room 108.
Explain your complaint to the officer on duty.
Complete the Complaint Registration form (Form G-02).
Attach any supporting evidence.
You will receive a complaint reference number for follow-up.

location.notes: Ground floor, near the main information board

title: Case Tracking
description: Check the status of your case
steps: Have your case number ready (found on your receipt or confirmation SMS).
Visit the Information Desk, Floor 1, Room 101.
Give your case number to the officer.
They will print or show you the current status and next hearing date.
Alternatively, use the self-service kiosk in the main hall.
documents: Case reference number (from receipt or SMS)
National ID or passport (for identity verification)

location.notes: Immediately to the right of the main entrance
Near the entrance — no waiting required
